Package com.dassault_systemes.catjdialog


interfaces CATITranslator

Class Location


Framework : CATJDialog

Module : CATJDialog

Class Description

public interface interfaces CATITranslator
Interface to support National Language Support considerations.

This interface is mainly unsed for localizing combo-box items.

Method Summary

public String translate(CATDialog iDialog, String iInternalValue) Translate the internal value into a localized string.


Method Detail

translate 

    public String translate(CATDialog iDialog, String iInternalValue)
Translate the internal value into a localized string.

If there is no translation for the value, the input value should be returned.

parameters:
iDialog
The graphical component related to this translation.
iInternalValue
The internal string value.
